member.name: T:UnityEditor.Bindings.OpenImageIO.OiioWrapper
member.summary: Class containing bindings for IO operations using OpenImageIO library

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Bindings.OpenImageIO.OiioWrapper.WriteImage(Unity.Collections.FixedString4096Bytes,System.UInt32,UnityEditor.Bindings.OpenImageIO.OiioWrapper.ImageHeader*)
member.summary: Writes an image to the specified file name.
member.param: Path of the file to write.
Number of sub-images in this file.
Pointer to ImageHeaders for the file to write.
member.returns: An integer representing the return code

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Bindings.OpenImageIO.OiioWrapper.ReadImage(Unity.Collections.FixedString4096Bytes)
member.summary: Reads an image from its file name.
member.param: Path of the file to read.
member.returns: A SubImagesList with the information of the file.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Bindings.OpenImageIO.OiioWrapper.FreeAllocatedMemory(UnityEditor.Bindings.OpenImageIO.OiioWrapper.SubImagesList)
member.summary: Frees the memory allocated for the SubImagesList passed.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.Bindings.OpenImageIO.OiioWrapper.Attribute
member.summary: A struct (key value pair) used to encode metadata in an image.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.Bindings.OpenImageIO.OiioWrapper.Attribute.key
member.summary: Attribute key (its unique name as expected by OIIO)

member.name: T:UnityEditor.Bindings.OpenImageIO.OiioWrapper.ImageHeader
member.summary: A struct representing an Image Header

member.name: F:UnityEditor.Bindings.OpenImageIO.OiioWrapper.ImageHeader.channelsCount
member.summary: Number of channels in the image

member.name: T:UnityEditor.Bindings.OpenImageIO.OiioWrapper.SubImagesList
member.summary: A struct representing the sub-images in an image.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.Bindings.OpenImageIO.OiioWrapper.SubImagesList.subImagesCount
member.summary: Number of sub-images in this list.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Bindings.OpenImageIO.OiioWrapper.IntPtrToManagedArray``1(System.IntPtr,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Reads an IntPtr into an Array of structs of length arrayCount.
member.param: IntPtr pointing to the data to read.
Number of items in the array.
member.typeparam: Type of struct for the array.
member.returns: An array of type T structs.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Bindings.OpenImageIO.OiioWrapper.Tex2DFromImageHeader(UnityEditor.Bindings.OpenImageIO.OiioWrapper.ImageHeader)
member.summary: Reads an ImageHeader and returns it as a Texture2D.
member.returns: A Texture2D based on the passed ImageHeader.
member.exception: Throws if number of channels is not supported.
